case_title: LERIAN, MARGARET vs. DAVID'S DELICATESSEN & RESTAURANT

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF LERIAN, MARGARET AS TO DEFENDANT DAVID'S DELICATESSEN & RESTAURANT

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LERIAN, MARGARET RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DAVID'S DELICATESSEN & RESTAURANT $651.01 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $731.01
